{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Fisher section
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a [[Fisher section]] in the camp.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fisher section]] is part of the [[Alliance encampment]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
